title: Local government prohibition or regulation
doc_html:
§1300.63. Local government prohibition or regulation

            Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, a local government may enact an ordinance to prohibit the sale or distribution of mitragynine speciosa products or to regulate the sale or distribution of mitragynine speciosa products in a manner that is more restrictive than provided for in R.S. 14:91.10.

            Acts 2023, No. 416, §2.
doc_text:
§1300.63. Local government prohibition or regulation
Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, a local government may
enact an ordinance to prohibit the sale or distribution of mitragynine speciosa products or to
regulate the sale or distribution of mitragynine speciosa products in a manner that is more
restrictive than provided for in R.S. 14:91.10.
Acts 2023, No. 416, §2.
